mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate below 2.0% signals monetary easing that reduces the discount rate applied to equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as investors rebalance into equities.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS falls below 2.0% and remains there for at least 1 month
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns following FEDFUNDS < 2.0% are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment rate above 4.0% signals labor market deterioration that increases recession risk, causing equity investors to demand higher risk premiums and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises above 4.0% and increases by more than 0.3 percentage points within 3 months
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in more than 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating retail sales growth above 0.5% month-over-month signals robust consumer demand and earnings growth expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as momentum traders respond to demand signals.
failure_condition: Rank IC between RSAFS momentum and 5-day SPX returns falls below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or correlation becomes significantly negative (p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth decelerates below 0.2% month-over-month while unemployment remains elevated, signaling supply-side weakness and stagflation risk that compresses equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO month-over-month growth falls below 0.2% AND UNRATE is above 3.8%
failure_condition: Joint interaction signal produces Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day returns following trigger are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts decline below 1,200 thousand units while real GDP growth remains below 2.0% annualized, signaling demand-side weakness across both residential and aggregate demand that produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below 1,200 thousand units AND GDPC1 annualized growth rate is below 2.0%
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in more than 50% of triggered instances, or Rank IC of joint signal < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment growth accelerates above 200 thousand persons per month while inflation remains below 3.0% year-over-year, signaling healthy labor demand without overheating, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS month-over-month growth exceeds 200 thousand AND CPIAUCSL year-over-year growth is below 3.0%
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns following trigger are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC of joint signal < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price inflation accelerates above 3.5% year-over-year while the federal funds rate remains below 3.0%, signaling monetary policy is restrictive in real terms, causing equity investors to anticipate future rate hikes and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL year-over-year growth exceeds 3.5% AND FEDFUNDS is below 3.0%
regime_hint: inflation surge with policy lag regime
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in more than 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC of real rate signal < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index declines for two consecutive months, signaling contraction in manufacturing capacity utilization and forward-looking economic weakness, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as investors reprrice earnings expectations downward.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO declines month-over-month for two consecutive months
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in more than 60% of triggered instances, or Rank IC between INDPRO momentum and 5-day returns falls below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.
